ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reference_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference area */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the reference area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated total population of the reference area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of the reference area (e.g., country, region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period (e.g., 1975, 1980-1985) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of the time period (e.g., year, range) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex category */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the sex category (e.g., M, F) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 15-24 year olds) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units_of_measurement" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement (e.g., Percent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measurement */,
  "unit_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the unit of measurement (e.g., %, #) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reference area */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex category */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the observation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset to which the observation belongs */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units_of_measurement ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES reference_areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
